cards.name: Dol Guldur
cards.quote: Dol Guldur festers under the trees, and the wood around it seems to draw a darker breath.

cards.name: Morthrog
cards.quote: In darkness, I find my strength, and shadows obey my will.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hexes in radius 2 around all controlled characters.

cards.name: Goblin Miner
cards.quote: The tunnels are ours, and in them, we will thrive.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 2 Iron <sprite name="iron">.

cards.name: Balrog
cards.quote: I am fire, I am death, and I shall consume all.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (3 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Smaug
cards.quote: I am the king under the mountain, and all shall fear me.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 5 Gold <sprite name="gold">.

cards.name: Goblin King
cards.quote: Bow before your true ruler, or face the wrath of my horde.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 li <sprite name="li"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Barrow-wight
cards.quote: Flee, mortals, lest you join the forgotten of the earth.
cards.actionEffect: Conceal a random controlled settlement from enemies for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Azog
cards.quote: I will carve my name in the bones of my enemies.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 15 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: Cave Goblins
cards.quote: Swarm like shadows, strike like venom.

cards.name: Cave Trolls
cards.quote: Crush all who stand against us, for we are relentless.

cards.name: Creatures Of The Deeps
cards.quote: From the darkest depths, we rise to claim the light.

cards.name: Forest Orcs
cards.quote: The forest whispers our names, and violence is our song.

cards.name: Forest Spiders
cards.quote: We weave our webs of doom among the trees.

cards.name: Forest Wargs
cards.quote: With the speed of shadows, we hunt our prey.

cards.name: Goblin Sappers
cards.quote: Our clever hands shall bring the walls of the enemy crumbling down.

cards.name: Goblins Of Moria
cards.quote: In the dark of Moria, our laughter echoes like a death knell.

cards.name: Ruins Spiders
cards.quote: From the ruins, we emerge, hungry and waiting.

cards.name: Spawns of Ungoliant
cards.quote: Born from shadow and hunger, we know no fear.

cards.name: Undead
cards.quote: Once they lived, now they serve only darkness.

cards.name: Wolves
cards.quote: The howl of the pack heralds the hunt's beginning.

cards.name: Wood Trolls
cards.quote: In the heart of the forest, we are the giants that walk.

cards.name: SouthernMirkwood
cards.quote: South Mirkwood is old with trails, fumes, and the patient watch of hidden things.

cards.name: MistyMountains
cards.quote: The Misty Mountains hold their teeth against all who pass.

cards.name: MountainsOfMirkwood
cards.quote: Shadows cling to the towering peaks, whispering secrets of ancient woods.

cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.

cards.name: The Grimburgoth
cards.quote: In my veins flows the fury of the forest, unyielding and fierce.
cards.actionEffect: Downgrade fort <sprite name="fort"> on the nearest visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: BrownLands
cards.quote: Once verdant, now a memory, these lands bear the scars of forgotten battles.

cards.name: Nindalf
cards.quote: Where the waters flow slow, a haunting stillness pervades the air.

cards.name: Ethacali
cards.quote: I wield the shadows as my cloak, blending with the night's embrace.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 10 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: AmonLhaw
cards.quote: AmonLhaw watches the vale with a stillness that can outlast kingdoms.

cards.name: Ongushar
cards.quote: Ongushar is a thorn of a place, sharp enough to turn away easy hope.

cards.name: Goblin Gate
cards.quote: Goblin Gate gnaws at the pass like a broken fang, and the dark beyond it is never still.

cards.name: WitheredHeath
cards.quote: A barren stretch where hope has withered, the air thick with despair.

cards.name: Gondmaeglon
cards.quote: Gondmaeglon opens beneath the sky, and there is little there to soften the eye of war.

cards.name: Erebor (Lost)
cards.quote: Erebor (Lost) keeps its noble outline even in ruin, like a crown left in ash.

cards.name: Khazad-Dum
cards.quote: Khazad-Dum endures in buried majesty, and the dark below it still rings with memory.

cards.name: SarnGoriwing
cards.quote: SarnGoriwing crouches beneath the forest edge, where tree-shadow and river-mist meet in secrecy.

cards.name: Thuringwathost
cards.quote: Thuringwathost bears the mark of old terror, and the land around it has not forgotten the touch.

cards.name: AmonHen
cards.quote: AmonHen crowns the river with a stern eye, as if watching for the same doom that once came south.

cards.name: Bog Swarm
cards.quote: A foul mist rises from the marshes, cloaking the desolation.

cards.name: Mangonels
cards.quote: With a great roar, we unleash fate upon our foes.

cards.name: Celedhring
cards.quote: The stars whisper my name, guiding my path through the darkness.
cards.actionEffect: Apply ArcaneInsight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (1 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Bolg
cards.quote: Let them come; I shall crush their bones beneath my heel.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 ma <sprite name="ma"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Dagorlad
cards.quote: Where the shadows of war linger, the ghosts of past battles still whisper.

cards.name: The Necromancer
cards.quote: Let them call this place accursed. Dol Guldur does its work in silence, and silence is patient.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal a hidden artifact <sprite name="artifact"> on a visible hex.

cards.name: Chopping the Trees
cards.quote: The axe bites deep; the forest's heart quakes at the sound.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: Dragon-fire
cards.quote: Feel the heat of the ancient wyrm; it scorches all that dare approach.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Burning <sprite name="burning"> (1 turn); enemies on forest tiles also gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Flame of Udun
cards.quote: In darkness, I ignite fear, for the flames of Udun consume all.
cards.actionEffect: In radius 2, apply Burning <sprite name="burning"> (1 turn) and Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn) to all enemy units.

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.quote: The mountains whisper of swift vengeance; the raiders heed the call.
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Woodmen Hunters
cards.quote: Silent as the falling leaf, we stalk our prey.

cards.name: Blighted Glade
cards.quote: Beneath the rotting boughs, even the earth forgets its old health.
cards.actionEffect: The glade rots and hungers. Enemies on forest tiles in radius 2 are revealed and gain Bleeding <sprite name="bleeding"> (2); allied Spiders there gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2) and Haste <sprite name="haste">.

cards.name: Khamul's Command
cards.quote: No ringwraith speaks softly, yet his word moves armies where trumpets fail.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Nazgul and Orc units in radius 3 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2 turns) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Mirkwood Miasma
cards.quote: The forest exhales a breath older than the sunlit paths.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 2 forest gain Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (3 turns) and are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: The Necromancer's Whisper
cards.quote: A voice not quite heard finds the cracks in every shield.
cards.actionEffect: Whispers from the tower find every crack in the mind. Reveal Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> enemies in radius 2 and inflict Despair <sprite name="despair"> (2); visible enemies in radius 1 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> if none were hidden.

cards.name: Wyrm's Shadow
cards.quote: The winged terror needs not strike; its passing alone unravels defiance.
cards.actionEffect: Something vast and fire-breathing turns its eye southward. Enemy commanders in radius 2 lose Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> and gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (2); allied Dragons gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2).

cards.name: Rhovanion
cards.quote: Wide plains stretch beneath sweeping skies, where tales of valor are born.

cards.name: WhatDoesMordorCommand
cards.quote: From the depths of ash and shadow, we rise to reclaim our dominion.
cards.actionEffect: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Dol Guldur Rises
cards.quote: The hill of sorcery has not slept; it has waited.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 3 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (2 turns). Allied characters in your hex gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn).

cards.name: The Shadow Deepens
cards.quote: Night in Mirkwood is not the absence of light but the presence of something older.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> forest Spiders/Orcs/Goblins: Hasted and Hidden; agents Hidden; non-forest units slowed; armies +8% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> forest emissaries gain Arcane Insight; forest chars feared and revealed
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Unquiet Dead
cards.quote: What is buried under old roots does not always stay buried.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Undead hasted; agents Hidden; non-Undead near enemy slowed; armies +8% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> near allied settlements gain Hope; near Undead 25% slowed
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Smoke of Dol Guldur
cards.quote: The smell of the place reaches further than its walls.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> mages gain Arcane Insight; forest agents Hidden; non-forest units slowed; armies +5% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> forest emissaries gain Arcane Insight; forest chars Poisoned and Despaired
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Cobwebs of Mirkwood
cards.quote: The great spiders weave more than silk; they weave dread.
cards.actionEffect: Webs in the dark, patient and wide. Enemies on forest tiles in radius 2 gain Halted <sprite name="halted"> and Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2); allied Spiders in radius 2 gain Haste <sprite name="haste">.

cards.name: Khamul
cards.quote: The night is my ally, and fear is my weapon.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Barad-dur
cards.quote: Barad-dûr broods over the ash like the final answer of a will that would not bend.

cards.name: Gorgoroth
cards.quote: A desolate wasteland, echoing with the cries of the damned.

cards.name: Khamul Unleashed
cards.quote: The Shadow of the East cannot be chained. The Easterlings march under my eye, and no forest will hide those who oppose the Dark Lord.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> <sprite name="ma"><sprite name="ar"><sprite name="li"> armies in forest or mountain hexes gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> each turn
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: Snow
cards.quote: The whiteness of winter takes what warmth the road remembers.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Orcs/mountain units gain Hidden; non-mountain units slowed; armies +5% attack
<sprite name="freePeople"> 10% freeze chance; cavalry 20% freeze chance
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected

cards.name: WildFire
cards.quote: The forest weeps as flames dance, a terrible beauty unleashed.
cards.actionEffect:
<sprite name="darkServants"> Orcs/Goblins in forest gain Haste; 5% chance of Burning (collateral)
<sprite name="freePeople"> forest emissaries gain Arcane Insight; 20% chance of Burning; Burning units halted
<sprite name="Neutral"> unaffected
